parsed.availability_comment: He missed the IPL 2025 restart, but later stated he wanted to represent DC in 2026. No fresh injury/withdrawal report was found, so only a small haircut is applied for normal fast-bowler management.
parsed.availability_note: No current official unavailability found for the opening block; retained by DC and listed in 2026 squad/match materials.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Starc is part of DC's retained core and is ahead of backup overseas pace options when fit.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Strong preferred overseas bowler; competition is more about the remaining overseas slots than his own place.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained first-choice overseas quick; if available, he is expected to start more often than not.
